title: SCSS Build Executor
description: Run SCSS theme compilation pipeline in all or CI mode

mode.description: Compilation mode. all = full themes set, ci = reduced dev themes set.

bundlesDir.description: Generated SCSS bundles directory relative to project root

cssOutputDir.description: Output CSS artifacts directory relative to project root

devBundles.description: Bundle names used in CI mode

watch.description: Watch SCSS sources and rebuild on changes

bundles.description: Bundle names for watch mode (array or comma-separated string)
